quote: When uncomfortable, my instinct is not to avoid the discomfort but to become at peace with it. – Josh Waitzkin
fact: The shape of plant collenchyma’s cells and the shape of the bubbles in beer foam are the same - they are orthotetrachidecahedrons.
joke: Why did the fireman wear red, white, and blue suspenders? To hold his pants up.
